headline: Chicken or the Egg? Why We Need to Rethink Data and Funding in Startups
summary: Raising capital while still building the data needed to validate an idea is often one of the biggest hurdles for start-ups.

headline: Pfizer Beats Earnings Estimates. The Drugmaker Is Finding Life After Covid.
summary: Pfizer  faces a looming patent cliff and evaporating demand for its Covid drugs.  Quarterly revenue rose 2% on an operational basis to $14.5 billion and topped analysts’ calls for $13.8 billion.  Excluding contributions from Pfizer’s Covid franchise, which includes its Comirnaty vaccine and Paxlovid antiviral pill, revenue grew 7% on an operational basis.

raw.headline: Pfizer Beats Earnings Estimates. The Drugmaker Is Finding Life After Covid.

headline: Pfizer Stock Rises on Earnings. The Drugmaker Is Finding Life After Covid.
summary: Pfizer  shares climbed on Tuesday after the company delivered a first-quarter earnings beat and reaffirmed its full-year outlook.  The drugmaker posted adjusted earnings of 75 cents a share, ahead of the 72 cents Wall Street had forecast.  Quarterly revenue rose 2% on an operational basis to $14.5 billion and topped analysts’ calls for $13.8 billion.
